title: [YTP] RANDY'S RAVAGE
description:
Hope everybody had a HappaH HoHLoLWeeW!  I really don't know what we're doin' here, man...

The source content choice was 100% inspired by my girlfriend and I basically made this for her.  Sorry that it's pretty short, but after overdoing it with the Doug YTP I kinda relaxed a bit with this one.
